pi_items.source: Task description line 5 describes 'clinical screening survey for an influenza vaccine study'

privileged_info_summary: This task requires creating a LimeSurvey survey titled 'Influenza Vaccine Study Screener 2026' for clinical trial eligibility screening. The survey must include a Date of Birth question (code: DOB) and a hidden age calculation equation (code: AGE_CALC) that determines participant eligibility. A 'Medical History' group containing at least 3 medical questions must only be visible to participants aged 18-65 years inclusive, enforced through group-level relevance equations. The survey must be activated upon completion.
